com.microsoft.teams (2BUA8C4S2C).OrganizationJustification: Microsoft Teams requires camera and microphone access for video calls. Your organization uses Teams for all video conferencing.

com.microsoft.onenote (UBF8T346G9).OrganizationJustification: OneNote requires microphone access for audio note recording.
